body:
Body dismorphia is roughless and it's hard to understand for people who haven't suffered from it, yet. I saw many guys on reddit with amazing transformations where I think "damn, would be a dream to look like this" but the dude still fells like he is the same fat guy he was before and rather often than not I feel the same. You can go past a mirror, look bigger in it than in your home mirror and it crushes you massively. Or when you wanna approach a girl, remember how you look without the shirt and just go away because you will get disappointed anyways.

I set myself some small, some bigger goals. For example the next bigger goal is to be below 85kg at the end of August and be way better toned than now. Maybe I'll have some self esteem then.

Congrats on your weightloss aswell!

body: I don't drive, its not good vibes and hinders the experience in town for non runners. There is plenty of space in east sussex it makes no sense to do it through the centre of a busy city, literally don't think it brings in more revenue than it costs and is just a nuisance. Shocked I'm down voted cause most people I've spoke to in Brighton about this agree with me and thinks it should be done away with as it  hinders on city life.

body:
Capitalizing your words as if you’re shouting them isn’t going to make what you’re saying any more valid. I suppose you think whoever yells louder in an argument is right.

I know precisely what I said. You were trigger happy because you were itching to use a quote for the entirety of our discussion as if I’d be speechless as to what to say next.

I said 

> Biden’s sentences turn a bit to gibberish

Aka when you’re listening to it on the television it literally describes it as “unintelligible”. You know, the definition of gibberish. No words are being spoken. They trail off. Dotdotdot. Where he literally forgets words in the constitution. Where he literally stops midway through a sentence and says “you know”, because he can’t finish a thought. That is what I’ve been talking about. This is why I said let’s leave out the sound bites. I never said Trump doesn’t ramble. You asked for data as if there isn’t an archive for this shit and I delivered, but it’s pretty apparent you’re absolutely coping at the fact the guy you went to bat for is fucking franks and beans. 

The only person who’s been struggling to not put words in anybody’s mouth is you. The only person who’s been struggling to stay inside the parameters of our discussion is you. Fuck off already.

body:
>2000 mules is not a valid source and I did not see a link in there.  Is there a court document you can link? Maybe a news article?

Not a valid source for what? True the vote is not a valid. Have you seen 2000 mules? Obviously not since you had no idea that cell data was used. So you haven't seen it but you're calling it not a valid source. Hmmmm interesting. Do you usually criticize things you haven't seen or don't know anying about like the use of data to track vote fraud? 

Ok, you don't like the documentary 2000 mules, then True the vote which is a nonpartisan election watchdog. So the game your playing is if its not reported in what you deem "credible media" then its false? HMMMM interesting. you seem very very very partisan. 

I'm sorry you want to attack things you know nothing about like True the vote uncovering suspicious activity at drop boxes. True the vote is seperate from 2,000 mules do you know that? What is not valid about True the votes work here? Are you claiming the cell data is fake and false and the camera footage is made up? HHMMMMMMMM very interesting?

I ask about your CA claim because a lot of NS says vote fraud never occurred but here you are trying to point to so-called fraud that supports your partisan angle but are not interested in lawfully obtained suspicious cell data going to multiple drop boxes in the middle of the night.  Its a check mate. Biden did not get 81 million votes.

&#x200B;

Sorry junior I don't think i can help you, you're too partisan.
